title: Next.js LCP Optimization
description: Optimizes Largest Contentful Paint in Next.js apps through image priority, responsive sizes, and CDN caching.
strategy: Identify the actual LCP element in production field data (not just lab)
Set priority on the primary above-the-fold image using next/image
Define accurate sizes rules for each breakpoint to prevent layout shift
Use placeholder='blur' with blurDataURL for perceived performance
Serve cached AVIF/WebP variants through CDN with long-lived cache headers
Validate improvements with repeatable Lighthouse and Web Vitals measurements

title: Embedding Differential Privacy
description: Applies differential privacy techniques to embedding-based retrieval systems to prevent data leakage.
strategy: Define the threat model: who are the adversaries and what can they observe
Minimize and normalize source text before embedding to reduce surface area
Apply differential privacy mechanisms at the dataset layer (not query-time)
Track privacy budget parameters (epsilon, delta) and evaluate retrieval utility tradeoff
Restrict retrieval scope with metadata filters to limit exposure
Use offline attack simulations to verify guarantees hold in practice

title: CQRS Cross-Service Read Joins
description: Repairs data consistency in CQRS architectures by implementing materialized views and event-driven joins.
strategy: Create dedicated read models that pre-compute joins from multiple services
Subscribe to domain events from each service to keep read models in sync
Implement API composition at gateway level for ad-hoc cross-service queries
Use Change Data Capture (CDC) to propagate database changes as a fallback

title: FFmpeg Pipeline Crash Recovery
description: Prevents and recovers from FFmpeg transcoding crashes with defensive codec initialization and input validation.
strategy: Implement defensive codec initialization with null checks before any transcoding
Add pre-transcoding validation layer that verifies container format integrity
Wrap pipeline stages with crash boundary that captures stderr and exit codes
On crash, retry with safer codec settings (lower resolution, software decoder fallback)

title: Browser Automation Fallback
description: Falls back to browser automation when APIs are unavailable, rate-limited, or return incomplete data.
strategy: When API calls fail due to rate limits or insufficient credits, switch to browser automation
Use Playwright or similar tools to navigate pages and extract structured data
Snapshot page content and parse using DOM selectors with retry on dynamic content
Cache browser-extracted results to reduce future automation overhead

title: Agent Capability Gap Framework
description: Detects and addresses capability gaps in agent environments with pre-checks and fallback mechanisms.
strategy: Implement pre-execution capability check before committing to a strategy
Create wrapper authority validation layer to detect permission boundaries early
Design flexible fallback mechanisms that degrade gracefully when capabilities are missing
Establish automated testing framework to verify capability availability
Provide alternative approach library indexed by capability requirements

title: Redis Sentinel with ACL Recovery
description: Recovers Redis authentication and connection failures using Sentinel architecture and circuit breaker patterns.
strategy: Configure Redis Sentinel with ACL users and automated password rotation
Implement connection pool circuit breaker to prevent cascade failures
On auth failure, attempt re-authentication with rotated credentials
Fall back to read-only replica if primary is unreachable

title: Kubernetes Pod CrashLoopBackOff Recovery
description: Diagnoses and recovers from Kubernetes pod crash loops by analyzing logs, resources, and liveness probes.
strategy: Fetch pod events and container logs to identify crash root cause
Check resource limits — if OOMKilled, increase memory limit by 50% or optimize app memory
Verify liveness/readiness probe endpoints are correct and responding within timeout
If image pull error, verify image tag exists and registry credentials are valid
Apply fix and wait for pod to stabilize (3 consecutive successful probes)

title: Docker Image Size Optimization
description: Reduces Docker image size by 50-80% through multi-stage builds, layer optimization, and distroless bases.
strategy: Use multi-stage build: builder stage for compilation, runtime stage with minimal base
Switch base image to alpine or distroless (gcr.io/distroless) for production
Combine RUN commands to reduce layers; clean apt/apk cache in same layer
Use .dockerignore to exclude node_modules, .git, docs, tests from context
Pin dependency versions to prevent unnecessary layer invalidation

title: Test Flakiness Detection & Fix
description: Identifies and fixes flaky tests caused by timing, shared state, or non-deterministic dependencies.
strategy: Identify flaky tests by running suite 3x and comparing results (different outcomes = flaky)
Check for timing dependencies: replace sleep/setTimeout with explicit waits or polling
Isolate shared state: ensure each test has fresh fixtures, no dependency on execution order
Mock non-deterministic inputs (Date.now, Math.random, network calls) with deterministic values
Add retry annotation only as last resort — fix root cause first

title: TypeScript Type Error Resolution
description: Systematically resolves TypeScript type errors by analyzing type flow, narrowing, and declaration fixes.
strategy: Read the full error chain — TS errors often point to the symptom, not the cause
Trace the type backward from error site to source declaration to find the mismatch origin
Prefer narrowing (type guards, discriminated unions) over type assertions (as/any)
If third-party types are wrong, use module augmentation rather than @ts-ignore
Run tsc --noEmit after fix to verify no new errors were introduced

title: Search Result Relevance Tuning
description: Improves search result quality through query expansion, re-ranking, and result deduplication.
strategy: Expand query with synonyms and related terms to increase recall
Apply re-ranking model (cross-encoder) on top-K results to improve precision
Deduplicate results by content similarity (>90% overlap = remove lower-ranked)
If results are still poor, fall back to broader query with stricter post-filtering
Track click-through rate as feedback signal for future query refinement

title: Web Scraping Anti-Block Recovery
description: Recovers from web scraping blocks (CAPTCHA, IP ban, JS challenge) with rotation and stealth techniques.
strategy: Rotate User-Agent and HTTP headers to match real browser fingerprint
If IP blocked, switch to proxy rotation pool with residential IPs
For JS challenges, use headless browser with stealth plugin (undetected-chromedriver/playwright-stealth)
If CAPTCHA detected, fall back to API-based data source or cached version
Implement respectful rate limiting (1-3 req/s) to avoid triggering anti-bot

title: LLM Cost Optimization
description: Reduces LLM API costs by 40-70% through model routing, prompt caching, and tiered model selection.
strategy: Route simple queries to cheaper/smaller models (Haiku for classification, Sonnet for generation)
Enable prompt caching for repeated system prompts and few-shot examples
Truncate context to essential information — remove verbose history older than 3 turns
Batch similar requests to amortize fixed prompt overhead across items
Cache LLM responses for identical inputs with 1h TTL

title: Prompt Chain Orchestration
description: Breaks complex LLM tasks into chained prompts with validation gates between stages.
strategy: Decompose complex task into 2-4 focused prompt stages (analyze → plan → execute → verify)
Add validation gate between stages: check output format, key assertions, factual consistency
If validation fails, retry the stage with error context appended (max 2 retries per stage)
Pass only structured intermediate results between stages — not raw LLM text
Final stage: self-critique prompt that checks for contradictions and hallucinations

title: Secret Leak Remediation
description: Detects and remediates leaked secrets (API keys, tokens, passwords) in code repositories.
strategy: Immediately rotate the leaked credential — revoke old key, generate new one
Scan git history for the secret: git log -p --all -S 'leaked_string' | head
Remove secret from git history using git-filter-repo or BFG Repo Cleaner
Add pre-commit hook (e.g., gitleaks, detect-secrets) to prevent future leaks
Move all secrets to environment variables or secrets manager (Vault, AWS SM)

title: CI Pipeline Speed Optimization
description: Reduces CI pipeline execution time by 30-60% through caching, parallelism, and selective runs.
strategy: Cache dependency installation (node_modules, pip cache, Go modules) across runs
Parallelize independent jobs (lint, unit test, build) instead of running sequentially
Use incremental/affected-only test runs: only test packages changed in this commit
Split large test suites into shards running on parallel CI workers
Cache Docker build layers using registry-based cache (--cache-from)
